compile.command: uv run python -m py_compile src/hamutay/events.py tests/unit/test_events.py

notes: Added step_pending_events as a DES-facing wrapper around run_pending_events.
The helper reports stop_reason, next_wake_at, pending counts, wake_run_count, expired_count, and terminalized_count.
No live model calls were needed; fake backend tests exercise event-loop semantics deterministically.
